hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('BLOCKED: Validated fixtures must only be updated via tools/apply_decisions.py -- never edited directly.',file=sys.stderr) if 'fixtures/validated' in p else None; sys.exit(1 if 'fixtures/validated' in p else 0)"

bash -c "INPUT=$(cat); echo \"$INPUT\" | python -c \"import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0 if any(x in p for x in ['rules.py','rule_engine.py']) else 1)\" && uv run pytest tests/test_rules.py tests/test_rule_engine.py tests/test_rules_integrity.py -q --no-header 2>&1 | tail -15"
